leadText: Rock Climb (Japanese: ロッククライム Rock Climb) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation IV. It was HM08 in Generation IV. It is TM100 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations IV to VII 1.1.2 Generation VIII 1.1.2.1 Pokémon Sword and Shield 1.1.2.2 Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.1.3 Generation IX 1.2 Outside of battle 1.2.1 Generation IV 1.2.2 Generation V-VII 1.2.3 Generation VIII 1.2.4 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV to VII [ edit | edit source ] Rock Climb inflicts damage and has a 20% chance of confusing the opponent. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword and Shield [ edit | edit source ] Rock Climb cannot be selected in a battle. Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Rock Climb is usable and functions as it did in previous generations. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Rock Climb cannot be selected in a battle. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Rocky wall In certain games, Rock Climb requires a specific badge to use outside of battle; the Earth Badge HG SS or Icicle Badge D P Pt BD SP . Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] A Pokémon using Rock Climb can scale rocky walls . Generation V-VII [ edit | edit source ] Rock Climb can no longer be used outside of battle. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Rock Climb is a field move in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , usable via the Pokétch 's Hidden Moves app, which summons a wild Bibarel to use the move. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Rock Climb can no longer be used outside of battle.

Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Rock Climb is usable and functions as it did in previous generations. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS A charging attack that may also leave the foe confused. It can also be used to scale rocky walls. PBR A charging attack that may also leave the foe confused. B W B2 W2 The user attacks the target by smashing into it with incredible force. It may also confuse the target. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E The user attacks the target by smashing into it with incredible force. This may also confuse the target. Sw Sh LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered. BD SP A charging attack that may also leave the foe confused. It's also one of the Pokétch's hidden moves.
